disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Canadian hantavirus case confirmed as cruise ship docks in Netherlands for disinfection - CHCH
updates.body_en: Canadian hantavirus case confirmed as cruise ship docks in Netherlands for disinfection CHCH
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大汉坦病例确认，邮轮在荷兰停靠消毒。

updates.title_en: Argentine scientists lay first traps in hantavirus hunt - France 24
updates.body_en: Argentine scientists lay first traps in hantavirus hunt France 24
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷科学家首次布设陷阱搜寻汉坦病毒。

updates.body_en: Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship docks in Netherlands The Shillong Times
updates.summary_zh: 受汉坦病毒影响的邮轮在荷兰停靠。

updates.body_en: American Hantavirus Patient Ordered to Stay in Quarantine Despite Plans to Leave The New York Times
updates.summary_zh: 美国汉坦患者被令隔离，尽管计划离开。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus in Focus I: what we know and what it means - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: Hantavirus in Focus I: what we know and what it means World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO发布汉坦病毒焦点报告：已知与意义。

updates.title_en: Adult dies of hantavirus in Colorado, state health officials say - Reuters
updates.body_en: Adult dies of hantavirus in Colorado, state health officials say Reuters Colorado adult dies from hantavirus after local rodent exposure USA Today Health leaders offer safety tips after Colorado hantavirus death KKTV
updates.summary_zh: 科罗拉多州一名成人死于汉坦病毒，州卫生官员确认。

updates.title_en: Booming Expedition-Cruise Business Grapples With Fallout From Hantavirus Outbreak - WSJ
updates.body_en: Booming Expedition-Cruise Business Grapples With Fallout From Hantavirus Outbreak WSJ
updates.summary_zh: 探险邮轮业因汉坦病毒疫情面临冲击。

updates.body_en: Argentina’s icy outpost at the end of the world fears the hantavirus will chill tourism AP News

updates.summary_zh: 全球汉坦病毒预防措施实施，船只在荷兰靠港。

updates.summary_zh: 埃博拉和汉坦病毒促使非洲领导人讨论健康主权。

updates.body_en: Colorado records first hantavirus death since 2024. It’s not from the cruise ship. The Colorado Sun

updates.body_en: WHO assembly opens under shadow of Ebola, hantavirus and funding cuts UN News
updates.summary_zh: WHO大会在埃博拉、汉坦病毒和资金削减阴影下开幕。

updates.body_en: Britain gets experimental drug from Japan to bolster hantavirus response Reuters
